name: alealv-plugins
description: Personal collection of Claude Code plugins for development workflows, task automation, and specialized tools

plugins.name: justfile-expert
plugins.description: Expert guidance for Just task runner and justfiles

plugins.name: zellij-tools
plugins.description: Remote control Zellij terminal multiplexer sessions for interactive CLIs and parallel workflows

plugins.name: knowledge-arch
plugins.description: Scaffold and audit a layered agent-knowledge architecture (AGENTS.md/CLAUDE.md/rules/skills/memory/constitution) with graph-first code and Codex parity

plugins.name: git-isolated-commit
plugins.description: Commit in-progress changes to a target branch via a throwaway git worktree — safe when a parallel agent has hopped HEAD or the working tree is dirty

plugins.name: sdd-flow
plugins.description: Loop-native spec-driven development: a wizard of three autonomous loops (spec → plan+review → TDD implement) with human gates between phases
